enGB: My Feat
This is my feat, not your feat.
Focused Infusion(Free)
zhCN: 聚能灌注（自由）

enGB: Cooling Down
zhCN: 冷却中……

enGB: When the cruoromancer uses this infusion, he adds +1 to the DC of the infused necromancy spell. This ability can be used only once per round. At 5th level, the bonus increases to +2. At 8th level, this infusion becomes a free action.
zhCN: 融血师以此形式灌注血液之力时，被灌注的死灵法术难度等级+1。此能力每回合只能使用一次。5级时，加值提升至+2；8级时，此灌注改为一个自由动作。

enGB: Sickening Infusion(Free)
zhCN: 恶心灌注（自由）

enGB: Cooling Down
zhCN: 冷却中……

enGB: When the cruoromancer channels blood power in this way, a creature that takes damage from the infused necromancy spell becomes sickened for 1 + half your wizard level rounds. You can use this ability only once per turn. At 8th level, this infusion becomes a free action.
zhCN: 融血师以此形式灌注血液之力时，受到被灌注的死灵法术伤害的生物陷入恶心状态，持续1 + 你的法师等级的一半的轮数。此能力每回合只能使用一次。8级时，此灌注改为一个自由动作。

enGB: Blood Infusion (Free)
zhCN: 融血灌注（自由）

enGB: Wizard Bonus Feat (Augment Summoning)
zhCN: 法师额外专长（增强召唤）

enGB: At 6th level, the cruoromancer gains a wizard bonus feat, which must be Augment Summoning.
zhCN: 融血师6级时获得一个法师额外专长，固定为增强召唤。

enGB: When using this infusion with animate dead, the summoned undead gain a +4 innate bonus to Strength and Charisma for the spell’s duration. At 15th level, undead summoned in this way gain temporary hit points equal to three times your wizard HD.
zhCN: 通过在施放操纵亡者时以此形式灌注血液之力，你召唤出的死灵生物将在力量和魅力属性上获得+4天赋加值，直到召唤法术的持续时间结束。15级时，以此方式召唤的死灵生物额外获得数值为三倍你法师HD的临时生命值。

enGB: Profane Infusion
zhCN: 亵渎灌注

enGB: When the cruoromancer uses this infusion, the infused necromancy spell gains a +2 bonus to its caster level. You can use this ability only once per turn, and activating it is a free action.
zhCN: 当融血师以此形式灌注血液之力时，被灌注的死灵法术施法者等级获得+2加值。此能力每回合只能使用一次，为自由动作。

enGB: At 20th level, a cruoromancer can use his blood infusions without spending hit points. In addition, the bonuses granted by his Focused Infusion and Profane Infusion increase to +4.
zhCN: 达到20级后，融血师施展融血灌注时不再消耗生命值。此外，其聚能灌注与亵渎灌注所提供的加值提升至+4。

enGB: Blood Line Undead
zhCN: 亡灵血承

enGB: Your family atmosphere is filled with a foul smell of a cemetery. Perhaps your ancestors were powerful necromancers or vampires, or maybe you were a deceased person who was suddenly brought back to life. Anyway, the power of death flows through you, influencing every action you make. You can summon the evil power of the dead. Unfortunately, each time you use this power, you get closer to joining them. Necromancer Bloodline Extra Talent: Combat Casting, Hardened Stone, Iron Will, Skill Focus (Knowledge: Religion), Spell Focus, High Spell Focus, Robust, Tenacious.
zhCN: 你的家族弥漫着一股墓地的腐败气息。或许你的先祖曾是一名实力强劲的巫妖或吸血鬼，也可能是你自出生便是死者，只是突然被复活了而已。无论如何，死亡之力在你的身上流淌，影响着你的每个动作。你可以呼唤死者的邪恶力量。不幸的是，你每使用一次这种力量，就会离加入它们更近一步。亡灵血承额外专长：战斗施法、顽石强韧、钢铁意志、技能专攻（学识：宗教）、法术专攻、高等法术专攻、健壮、顽强。

enGB: Blood Line Undead Arcana
zhCN: 亡灵血承奥法

enGB: The additional special skills bestowed by the Bloodline Undead
zhCN: 亡灵血承赋予的额外本职技能

enGB: Ray Of Enfeeblement
zhCN: 衰弱射线

enGB: When reaching level 3, and every 2 levels thereafter, the Warlock can learn an additional spell from Bloodline. This spell is not counted towards the number of spells granted by the new level. Weakness Ray: A dazzling ray shoots out from your hand. You need to successfully make a ranged touch attack check to hit the target. The target will suffer 1d6 + 1 point of strength penalty per 2 levels of the caster (up to a maximum of 1d6 + 5 points). The target's strength will not be reduced below 1 point. A successful Fortitude saving throw halves the penalty. Multiple penalties do not stack; only the highest penalty is taken.
zhCN: 达到3级时，以及之后每升2级，术士都可以额外学习一个来自于血承的法术。该法术不计入新等级赋予的法术数量。衰弱射线：一道耀眼的射线从你的手中射出。你需要成功进行远程接触攻击检定，才能够击中目标。目标会受到1d6+每两个施法者等级1点力量减值（最高1d6+5点）。目标的力量不会被降到1点以下。强韧豁免成功可使减值减半。多个减值不会叠加，只取其中最高的减值。

enGB: Dhampir Resonance
zhCN: 吸血鬼共鸣

enGB: Your veins are infused with the power of the undead. When using spells from the Undead School, the caster's level increases by 1/4 of the character's level.
zhCN: 吸血裔能与死亡的力量共鸣，使用死灵学派法术时施法者等级提升1/4角色等级。

enGB: Resonate with the power of death through your blood, and your caster level for the Necromancy school will increase based on your character level.
zhCN: 通过你的血脉与死亡的力量共鸣，根据角色等级提升用于死灵学派的施法者等级。

enGB: The balance between life and death has been shattered within you. The frigid breath of death has completely overwhelmed your vitality, and you have been fully transformed into an undead creature.
zhCN: 生死之间的平衡在你身上被打破了，冰冷的死气完全压倒你的生机，你彻底转变成一名不死生物。

enGB: Upon reaching Level 20, your body is permeated by the power of death, and you no longer possess vital organs in the conventional sense. You gain immunity to cold, paralysis, sleep, and precision damage. You also acquire damage reduction 5/—. Additionally, you get a +4 morale bonus on saving throws against spells and spell-like abilities cast by undead creatures.
zhCN: 达到20级后，你的躯体被死亡的力量浸润了，再也没有常规意义上的要害，你对寒冷、麻痹、睡眠和精准伤害免疫。同时获得伤害减免5/—。你在对抗不死生物施展的法术和类法术能力时，豁免检定获得+4士气加值。

enGB: Limited to three uses per day, you can drain blood from a living creature or from the corpse of a living being. When you do so, you gain 5 temporary hit points, plus an additional 5 temporary hit points for every three Hit Dice you possess. You also gain a +1 bonus on Fortitude saving throws. All these effects last for 1 hour.
zhCN: 每日限三次，你可以从一个活物身上吸血，或者从活物的尸体上吸血。若如此做，你获得5点临时生命值，你每拥有三个生命骰，额外获得5点临时生命值。你还会在强韧豁免检定上获得+1加值。以上效果持续1小时。如果你是觅血者则恢复一点血池点数。

enGB: When reaching level 7, and every 6 levels thereafter, the sorcerer gains 1 additional feat, which is selected from the feat list corresponding to each bloodline. The character must meet the prerequisites of the additional feat.Additional Feats for Undead Bloodline: Combat Casting, Diehard, Iron Will, Skill Focus (Knowledge: Religion), Spell Focus, Greater Spell Focus, Toughness, Tenacious, Metamagic (Maximize Spell).
zhCN: 达到7级时，以及之后每升6级，术士都会获得1个额外专长，从各血承对应的专长列表中选择。角色必须满足额外专长的先决条件。 亡灵血承额外专长：战斗施法、顽石强韧、钢铁意志、技能专攻（学识：宗教）、法术专攻、高等法术专攻、健壮，顽强，超魔（法术极效）。

enGB: Invoke Death
zhCN: 唤起死亡

enGB: As a standard action, you summon a fierce skeletal champion to serve you. This undead creature gains a bonus to its Strength and Charisma equal to your Charisma modifier.The duration is 1 minute per Charisma modifier.At 7th level, you can additionally summon one bloody bones beast.At 15th level, you can additionally summon one soul-eater.
zhCN: 以一个标准动作，唤起一个凶猛骷髅战将来服侍你，这个不死生物的力量和魅力获得你的魅力调整值的加值。持续时间等于1分钟/魅力调整值，7级时可以额外唤起一个血腥骨兽，15级时可以额外唤起一个吞魂鬼。

enGB: Blood Bath
zhCN: 血流成河

enGB: Whenever you deal negative energy damage with a spell or ability, the target begins to bleed, taking 1d6 damage each round. This damage increases by an additional 1d6 at 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter. Your necromancy spells benefit from increased range, as if modified by the Distant Spell metamagic feat.
zhCN: 当你造成负能量伤害的法术或能力时，将会使敌人开始流血，每轮受到1D6点伤害，5级以及之后每5级，该伤害再增加1D6。你的死灵法术能增加远距离施法，如同运用了超魔：法术及远。

enGB: Endless Murderous Intent
zhCN: 无尽杀意

enGB: Once per round, you may use Cure Critical Wounds or Inflict Critical Wounds as a free action.
zhCN: 每轮1次，你能以自由动作使用重伤术或者杀生术

enGB: Starting at 2nd level, a Dirge Singer gains a bonus to Knowledge (religion) checks equal to half her bard level. A Dirge Singer can use mind-affecting spells to affect undead as if they were living creatures. For the purpose of determining which spells can affect undead, treat them as humanoids. Additionally, add the following necromancy spells to her list of known spells:2nd level: Ray of Enfeeblement, Cause Fear.6th level: Scare, Command Undead.8th level: Lesser Control Undead, Ray of Exhaustion.10th level: Control Undead, Fear.14th level: Ray of Agony, Wave of Fatigue.17th level: Purge Undead, Sonic Wail
zhCN: 2级起，哀歌咏者在学识（宗教）检定上获得等于吟游诗人等级一半的加值。哀歌咏者可以用影响心智的法术影响不死生物，如同它们是活物一般。在判定哪些法术可以影响不死生物时，将它们视为类人生物。此外，将以下死灵法术加入已知法术列表：2级时，衰弱射线，惊恐术。6级时，恐吓术，号令死灵。8级时，次等操纵亡者，力竭射线。10级时，操纵亡者，恐惧术。14级时，剧痛射线，疲乏波。17级时，净化亡者，音爆哀鸣

enGB: Animate Dead Reinforcement
zhCN: 亡者增援

enGB: Summon Zombie
zhCN: 召唤僵尸战士

enGB: Once per day, summon a CR 3 zombie warrior to fight for you. It lasts 10 minutes per level of Necromancer.
zhCN: 每天1次，召唤一个CR3的僵尸战士为你作战，持续每活尸学家等级10分钟

enGB: Summon Ghoul Hunt Master
zhCN: 召唤食尸鬼狩猎大师

enGB: Once per day, summon a CR 7 Ghoul Hunt Master to fight for you. It lasts 10 minutes per level of Necromancer.
zhCN: 每天1次，召唤一个CR7的食尸鬼狩猎大师为你作战，持续每活尸学家等级10分钟

enGB: Summon Bloody Bones Servant
zhCN: 召唤血腥骨兽

enGB: Once per day, summon a Bloody Bones Servant to fight for you. It lasts 10 minutes per level of Necromancer.
zhCN: 每天1次，召唤一个血腥骨兽为你作战，持续每活尸学家等级10分钟

enGB: Fatal Embrace
zhCN: 致命拥抱

enGB: Your embrace is lethal enough; with a single touch, you can temporarily transform a target into an undead creature.
zhCN: 你的拥抱足以致命，你可以用一个接触动作将目标短暂地转化为不死生物。

enGB: Additional Spell (FalseLifeGreater)
zhCN: 额外法术（高等虚假生命）

enGB: Additional Specialties: Resilience, Evade, Tenacity, Agile Movement, Powerful Attack, Weapon Specialization, Weapon Proficiency, Heavy Strike Mastery.
zhCN: 额外专长：顽强、闪避、坚韧、灵活移动、猛力攻击、武器专攻、武器专精、重击精通。
